2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 109
Date 24 May 2026
Time 20:46
Title Race reconnaissance laps SC2 - SC1
Description Race reconnaissance laps SC2 - SC1
Enclosed CAN DOC 109 - Race SC2-SC1 Times.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 109 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  24 May 2026 
 
        Time  20:46 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Reconnaissance laps - Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below exceeded the 1:22.0 time limit between the Safety Car lines. 
 
No. Car Driver Competitor Time of Day 
1 5 Gabriel Bortoleto Audi Revolut F1 Team 15:22:17 
2 77 Valtteri Bottas Cadillac Formula 1 Team 15:27:22 
3 10 Pierre Gasly BWT Alpine F1 Team 15:28:31 
 
 
Infringement Alleged breach of Article B1.8.5 of the FIA F1 Regulations and Article 12.2.1.i of the FIA International 
Sporting Code (non-compliance with the Race Director’s Competition Notes, item 1, document 6). 
  
Decision No furt
